mapper.select: SELECT userInfo.`name` FROM t_data_info dataInfo INNER JOIN t_data_audit_record dataAudit ON dataInfo.data_id = dataAudit.data_id AND dataAudit.audit_status = 1 LEFT JOIN sys_user userInfo ON dataInfo.user_id = userInfo.user_id GROUP BY dataInfo.user_id ORDER BY count(dataInfo.user_id) desc Limit 10

SELECT dataInfo.data_id,dataInfo.data_title, (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT( labelInfo.label_content ) FROM t_label_info labelInfo WHERE FIND_IN_SET( labelInfo.label_id, dataInfo.data_label )) AS data_label, dataInfo.data_source,dataInfo.file_name,dataInfo.original,dataInfo.partake_user FROM t_data_info dataInfo WHERE dataInfo.data_id =#{dataId}

SELECT dataInfo.data_id,dataInfo.data_title,dictItem.item_text AS data_type, (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT( labelInfo.label_content ) FROM t_label_info labelInfo WHERE FIND_IN_SET( labelInfo.label_id, dataInfo.data_label )) AS data_label,dataInfo.file_suffix, userInfo.`name` AS up_user,dataInfo.up_time,dataInfo.data_url,dataInfo.data_img_url,dataInfo.user_id FROM t_data_info dataInfo LEFT JOIN t_dict_item dictItem ON dataInfo.data_type = dictItem.item_id LEFT JOIN sys_user userInfo ON dataInfo.user_id = userInfo.user_id WHERE dataInfo.data_id = #{dataId}

SELECT dataInfo.data_id,dataInfo.data_title,userInfo.`name` AS up_user, dataInfo.up_time, (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT( labelInfo.label_content ) FROM t_label_info labelInfo WHERE FIND_IN_SET( labelInfo.label_id, dataInfo.data_label )) AS data_label, dataInfo.data_url,dataInfo.data_video_url,dataInfo.data_img_url,dataInfo.file_suffix,dataRecord.like_num, dataRecord.tap_num,dataRecord.collect_num,dataRecord.complete_num,dataInfo.user_id, IFNULL( userOperationStatus.like_status, 0 ) AS like_status, IFNULL( userOperationStatus.tap_status, 0 ) AS tap_status, IFNULL( userOperationStatus.collect_status, 0 ) AS collect_status, IFNULL( userOperationStatus.complete_status, 0 ) AS complete_status FROM t_data_info dataInfo LEFT JOIN sys_user userInfo ON dataInfo.user_id = userInfo.user_id LEFT JOIN t_data_record dataRecord ON dataInfo.data_id = dataRecord.data_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT max( CASE userOperation.operation_type WHEN '17' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ) like_status, max( CASE userOperation.operation_type WHEN '18' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ) tap_status, max( CASE userOperation.operation_type WHEN '19' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ) collect_status, max( CASE userOperation.operation_type WHEN '20' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ) complete_status, userOperation.event_id FROM t_user_operation_record userOperation WHERE userOperation.user_id = #{userId} AND userOperation.event_type = '13' AND userOperation.event_id=#{dataId} ) userOperationStatus ON dataInfo.data_id = userOperationStatus.event_id WHERE dataInfo.data_id=#{dataId}

SELECT dataInfo.data_id,dataInfo.data_title,dataInfo.data_video_url,dataInfo.file_suffix, userInfo.`name` AS up_user,dataInfo.up_time,dataInfo.user_id FROM t_data_info dataInfo INNER JOIN t_data_audit_record dataAudit ON dataInfo.data_id = dataAudit.data_id AND dataAudit.audit_status = 1 LEFT JOIN sys_user userInfo ON dataInfo.user_id = userInfo.user_id
AND dataInfo.data_type =#{dataInfo.dataType}
AND (dataInfo.data_title LIKE concat(concat('%',#{dataInfo.dataTitle}),'%')
OR FIND_IN_SET(#{item.labelId},dataInfo.data_label)
)
AND DATE_FORMAT(dataInfo.up_time, '%Y-%m-%d') >= DATE_FORMAT(#{dataInfo.upTimeBegin}, '%Y-%m-%d')
AND DATE_FORMAT(dataInfo.up_time, '%Y-%m-%d') <= DATE_FORMAT(#{dataInfo.upTimeEnd}, '%Y-%m-%d')
AND FIND_IN_SET(#{dataInfo.dataLabel}, dataInfo.data_label )
ORDER BY dataInfo.up_time DESC

SELECT dataExperience.id,dataExperience.user_id,userInfo.`name`,dataExperience.create_time,dataExperience.experience_content FROM t_data_experience dataExperience LEFT JOIN sys_user userInfo ON dataExperience.user_id = userInfo.user_id WHERE dataExperience.data_id=#{dataId} ORDER BY dataExperience.create_time DESC
